Mod Note: Retimed to a 58:54.000

This happened shortly after my first playthrough of the game, I was curious to see what would happen if I tried a more violent route, but it seemed to be impossible to kill anything. So don't expect much from this attempt, nobody else at the time was doing any sort of speedrun of the game (at least not to my knowledge) since I literally did it the same day the game came out.

Verifier: We go by RTA, not IGT. Time adjusted accordingly.
